description: Optimize the dashboard load time which has regressed from 1.2s to 4.8s after the v3.2 deployment, affecting user experience.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard is loaded WHEN the user accesses the dashboard THEN the load time should be <= 2s.

description: Address the API response time degradation from 120ms to 380ms after the database migration.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the API is called WHEN a request is made THEN the response time should be <= 200ms.

description: Resolve the memory leak issue in WebSocket connections that leads to server crashes.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a WebSocket connection is active WHEN it runs for 8 hours THEN memory usage should not exceed 100MB.

description: Implement automated performance regression detection in the CI pipeline to catch regressions before deployment.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a PR is created WHEN benchmarks are run THEN no regression should exceed 15% in p95 latency.

description: Implement monitoring for error rate percentage as a guardrail metric.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN error rate monitoring is implemented WHEN the error rate exceeds 5% THEN alerts should be triggered.

description: Set up alerts for performance metrics to notify the team of regressions.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN performance metrics are monitored WHEN thresholds are exceeded THEN alerts should be sent to the team.

description: Build a public status page that shows real-time performance metrics to improve customer visibility during incidents.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the status page is accessed WHEN an incident occurs THEN real-time metrics should be displayed.
dependencies: story-dashboard-load-time-optimization, story-api-latency-improvement, story-websocket-memory-leak-fix, story-performance-regression-detection, story-error-rate-monitoring, story-performance-alerts-setup

description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on performance issues.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback form is accessed WHEN a user submits feedback THEN the feedback should be recorded.
dependencies: story-dashboard-load-time-optimization, story-api-latency-improvement, story-websocket-memory-leak-fix, story-performance-regression-detection, story-error-rate-monitoring, story-performance-alerts-setup

description: Document the performance benchmarking process and results for transparency and future reference.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the documentation is created WHEN it is reviewed THEN it should provide clear guidelines on benchmarking.
dependencies: story-dashboard-load-time-optimization, story-api-latency-improvement, story-websocket-memory-leak-fix, story-performance-regression-detection, story-error-rate-monitoring, story-performance-alerts-setup

description: Analyze customer support tickets related to performance issues to identify root causes.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN support tickets are analyzed WHEN trends are identified THEN a report should be generated.
dependencies: story-dashboard-load-time-optimization, story-api-latency-improvement, story-websocket-memory-leak-fix, story-performance-regression-detection, story-error-rate-monitoring, story-performance-alerts-setup

description: Enhance the performance monitoring dashboard to include additional metrics and visualizations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the dashboard is accessed WHEN performance metrics are displayed THEN p50, p95, and p99 latencies should be visible.
dependencies: story-dashboard-load-time-optimization, story-api-latency-improvement, story-websocket-memory-leak-fix, story-performance-regression-detection, story-error-rate-monitoring, story-performance-alerts-setup
